awesomeListMeta.descriptionHTML: A curated list of awesome apps, extensions, modules, themes and tools for the Gnome Desktop Environment.
awesomeListMeta.description: A curated list of awesome apps, extensions, modules, themes and tools for the Gnome Desktop Environment.

nodes.itemHTML: • Sysprof - Profile an application or entire system.
• Workbenchstars308 - Learn and prototype with GNOME technologies.
• Junction - Junction lets you choose the application to open files and links.
• Fly-Piestars752 - Mouse-based menu.
• Custom Hot Corners - Extended - Customize hot corners.
• Just Perfection - Customize GNOME Shell.
• Blur-my-shellstars773 - Apply a blur effect to the overview and top panel background.
• DevHelp - Developer tool for browsing and searching API documentation.
• Contrast - Check the contrast between two colors.
• Icon Library - Symbolic icons for your apps.
• Symbolic Preview - Symbolics Made Easy.
• Commit - Commit message editor.
• Dynamic Gnome Wallpapersstars123 - Gallery of MacOS like dynamic wallpapers, and easy scripts to install them
• Apps for GNOME
• This Week in GNOME - Weekly news from project maintainers from the community.
• Planet GNOME - Federation of GNOME Developers' blogs.
• Apostrophe - Distraction-free Markdown editor.
• libadwaita - Library that contain official GNOME patterns and widgets (GTK4)
• libdazzle - Companion library to GObject and Gtk+, providing various new features. (GTK3)
• libhandy - Building blocks for modern adaptive GNOME apps (GTK3)
• Clapperstars468 - Simple and modern media player.
• GTK Documentation - Official GTK documentation.
• GJS Guide - Guide for GJS.
• Koohastars1.1k - A simple screen recorder.
• Spotstars1.6k - Spotify Client.
• Hello - Set of Hello World examples for GNOME/GTK in different languages.
• Font Downloaderstars112 - Get fonts from Google Font.
• Tangramstars646 - Group your webapps into a single application.
• Blanket - Listen to different sounds.
• Health - Health tracking.
• Cozystars962 - Audiobook player.
• Video Trimer - Trim video quickly.
• Curtail - Simple & useful image compressor.
• Drawingstars610 - Responsive drawing application.
• Identity - Compare image and video.
• Déjà Dup Backups - Simple backups tool.
• Dialect - Translate text.
• Markets - Stock, currency and cryptocurrency tracker.
• Obfuscate - Censor private information.
• Metadata Cleaner - View and clean metadata in files.
• Password Safe - Keepass-compatible password manager.
• Passbook - Password manager compatible with freedesktop secrets.
• GNOME Builder - Official IDE for creating GNOME applications.
• Gaphor - The simple modeling tool for UML and SysML.
• Webfont Kit Generatorstars68 - Create @font-face kits easily.
• GNOME Tweaks - Graphical interface for advanced GNOME settings.
• Arc Menu - Windows7-like application menu inspired by the one in Zorin OS.
• Extensions Syncstars215 - Syncs gnome shell keybindings, tweaks settings and extensions with their configuration across all gnome installations.
• Caffeine - Applet that let you deactivate the GNOME lock screen.
• Sunflower - Small and highly customizable twin-panel file manager.
• Solanum - Balance working time and break time.
• Pika Backup - Simple backups based on borg.
• Fragments - BitTorrent client.
• Newsflash - RSS feeds reader.
• Shortwave - Client for web-based radio.
• Nautilus Terminalstars286 - Integrates a terminal into Nautilus.
• Coverflow Alt-Tabstars278 - Advanced fullscreen app switcher.
• Application Volume Mixerstars83 - Control volume output per-application.
• Sound Input & Output Device Chooserstars666 - Quickly switch between different input and output devices.
• Simple Off Menu - Removes selected power options from system menu.
• Transparent Shellstars12 - Makes some UI elements transparent.
• Compiz alike windows effectstars89 - Adds wobbly effects to windows.
• Color Picker - Color pickle, working on both X11 and Wayland.
• RecAppstars101 - User friendly Open Source screencaster.
• GJS Documentation - Documentation for the JavaScript GTK bindings.
• Podcasts - Listen to your favourite podcasts.
• Boxes - View, access, and manage remote and virtual systems.
• GPastestars613 - Clipboard manager (composed of an application and a gnome-shell extension).
• Icon Preview - Simple utility to preview icons.
• Palette - Tool for viewing the GNOME colour palette.
• HydraPaper - Set a different background for each monitor.
• Cawbird - Twitter client.
• Jami - Client for Jami, a secure communication tool.
• Pdftagstars58 - Simple metadata editor for PDFs.
• Pop!stars157 - Official icon theme of Pop!_OS by System76.
• ComixCursors - X11 mouse theme with a comics feeling.
• Application Menu - Category-based menu for applications.
• Places Indicator - Menu that provides fast access to your folders.
• Dash-to-Panel - Make your desktop more similar to W7/KDE.
• Markerstars756 - Markdown editor with an integrated previewer.
• GNOME Todo - Minimal task manager.
• GTimeLogstars222 - Simple app for keeping track of time.
• Gnome Pomodoro - Simple pomodoro timer.
• Timetrack - Time tracker.
• Tilixstars4.9k - Tiling terminal emulator.
• Unifydmin - Unified administration panel for heterogeneous Linux servers.
• Catfish - Simple search application.
• Detwinner - Simple and fast tool for removing duplicate files.
• Geary - Modern mail client, created originally by Yorba.
• Feeds - An RSS/Atom feed reader.
• Haguichi - Graphical frontend for Hamachi.
• Foliatestars3.7k - Simple and modern eBook reader.
• Celluloidstars800 - Simple frontend for mpv.
• Curlew - Multimedia converter.
• GThumb - Powerful and advanced application to manage your photos and images.
• Lutrisstars5.8k - Open Source gaming platform.
• Todo.txt - Interface for todo.txt.
• GSConnectstars2.5k - KDE Connect implementation.
• KStatusNotifiers/AppIndicator Support - Appindicator systray.
• PaperWMstars1.9k - Tiled scrollable window management.
• Dash-to-Dock - A fully-featured dock.
• GMail Message Traystars71 - Integrate GMail with your desktop.
• GNOME++stars131 - Third-party application icons compatible with GNOME's current guidelines.
• GNOME News Feed - Official news posts.
• Recipes - Cooking application.
• PDF Slicer - Simple application to extract, merge, rotate and reorder pages of PDF documents.
• Pitivi - Beautiful and powerful video editor.
• Firefox GNOME Themestars2k - Integrate Firefox into GNOME-based desktop using Adwaita.
• GNOME's Discourse
• GNOME Wiki
• #gnome on GIMPNet - General-purpose GNOME IRC channel (complete list of channels)
• @GNOMEDesktop on Facebook
• GNOMEDesktop on Peertube
• @gnome on floss.social
• Dynamic Wallpaper Editorstars179 - Utility for editing GNOME's XML wallpapers
• Emoji Selectorstars409 - Emoji picker applet.
• Eolie - Web browser that uses vertical tabs.
• Paperwork - Personal document manager for scanned documents and PDFs.
• Lollypop - Beautiful music application.
• Time ++ - A todo.txt manager, time tracker, timer, stopwatch, pomodoro, and alarm clock.
• Bibatastars830 - Silm material-based cursor theme.
• Capitaine Cursorsstars908 - An x-cursor theme inspired by macOS and based on KDE Breeze. Designed to be paired with La Capitaine icons.
• Docker Integrationstars148 - An extension for managing docker containers
• Reddit
• Stack Overflow
• @gnome on Twitter
• GNOMEDesktop on Youtube
• Numix Squarestars150 - Flat square icon theme.
• Numix Circlestars806 - Flat rounded icon theme.
• GNOME Web - Official web browser project of GNOME.
• NFO Viewerstars115 - Simple viewer for NFO files, beating text editors with preset font and encoding settings and clickable hyperlink support.
• Nuvola Player - Runtime for web-based music streaming services providing a more native user experience and integration with Linux desktop environments.
• Vocalstars331 - Powerful, beautiful, and simple podcast client for the modern free desktop.
• Parlatype - Audio player specialized for transcription.
• Pulseeffectstars4.1k - Provides limiter, compressor, reverberation, equalizer and auto volume effects for PulseAudio applications.
• Coulrstars25 - Convert between RGB and hexadecimal codes for colours.
• GNOME Games - Game launcher and an emulation frontend to libretro.
• Menulibre - Manage your applications categories if you use a traditional application menu like Arc or the Application Menu.
• Peekstars9.3k - Simple screen recorder that saves your recording as a GIF.
• Removable Drive Menu - Status menu to show your removable drives.
• OpenWeather - Weather applet.
• Focuslistars76 - Ambient noise applet.
• Clipboard Indicatorstars594 - Simple clipboard applet.
• Desk Changerstars71 - Wallpaper slideshow applet.
• Paper - Material icon theme.
• Papirusstars5.4k - Material icon theme, initially based on Paper.
• La Capitainestars1.9k - Icon inspired by macOS and Material Design guidelines.
• Obsidianstars155 - Continuation of the famous Faenza theme.
• Elementary XFCEstars249 - Desktop-agnostic version of the icons of elementary OS.
• GNOME Newcomers Wiki - Perfect place to start contributing to GNOME.
• GNOME Developer Center - Contains all the official GNOME documentations.
• Valadoc - Documentation about Vala.
• The Python GTK+ 3 Tutorial - Introduction to writing GTK+ 3 applications in Python.
